# title

**Instance Property**

A localized title for a reading list item.

## Declaration

```swift
var title: String { get }
```

## Accessing item properties

- **dateOfLastVisit**: The date of the person’s last visit.
- **url**: A URL for the reading list item.

items.description: The date of the person’s last visit.
items.name: dateOfLastVisit

items.description: A URL for the reading list item.
items.name: url

title: title
